chosen_action.title: Preserve empty-board architecture repair when manual publisher follow-through is blocked

why_this_action.summary: The current board says there is no truthful do-now packet in this review window, and the system is supposed to spend this slot on a different executable lane or a concrete process repair. The highest-leverage repair available now was to stop a selector override that could demote an empty-board distribution-architecture repair back into measurement_hold just because a same-family manual publisher follow-through asset also existed.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family publisher overlap is active and another same-family burst is paused
distribution_lane_latest.json: the current lane is measurement_hold inside a short review window
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the current review window
distribution_action_brief.md: another StackOverflow or publisher packet refresh in this window would be fake progress

result.summary: Patched the distribution lane selector so an empty-board distribution_architecture_repair cannot be silently downgraded to measurement_hold by the blocked manual publisher follow-through guard, then added regression coverage for the exact active-window case and ran targeted unittest verification.
